bio: I am a PhD researcher in Computer Science, specializing in machine learning and artificial intelligence. My research focuses on developing efficient and scalable methods for deep learning.
Previously, I completed my Master's degree in Computer Science and my Bachelor's degree in Mathematics. I have published at top-tier venues including NeurIPS, ICML, and CVPR.
When not researching, I enjoy mentoring students, contributing to open-source projects, and exploring the intersection of AI and other scientific disciplines.

news.text: Paper accepted at AAAI 2026 on efficient transformer architectures.
Invited talk at the ML Systems Workshop at NeurIPS 2025.
Started internship at a leading AI research lab.
Received the Outstanding Graduate Researcher Award.
Paper accepted at ICLR 2025 on representation learning.
